entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hello, I have recently come across @David_Chaviano 's blog post regarding Digital Skills Initiative and I am writing to express my interest in a free certificate attempt.

I am a young man with 0.8 year of experience as an SAP BTP Full stack developer and I want to upskill myself with the SAP technologies.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Good Morning.

My name is Sunil Kumar Padhy , Im from India and I interest in participating in the digital skills initiative.

entry.title: Is it correct to delete COGI entries?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When a production confirmation is issued but the component isn't available in stock, it triggers an entry in the COGI (Controlling Goods Issue) list. Upon further examination, I observed that even though the production confirmation was reversed, the associated transaction 261 remained unresolved in COGI. There were no apparent errors detected in the goods movements. Hence, my question is whether it's advisable to address this issue by using the delete button to clear the error record in COGI?

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hello, I have recently come across @David_Chaviano 's blog post regarding Digital Skills Initiative and I am writing to express my interest in a free certificate attempt.

I am a young man with 0.8 year of experience as an SAP BTP Full stack developer and I want to upskill myself with the SAP technologies.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks

entry.title: Joining the Digital Skills Initiative - Ready to Dive in!
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

I'm thrilled to express my interest in joining the Digital Skills Initiative. With a background in Computer Science and Engineering, along with a strong passion for continuous learning. I'm eager to learn, collaborate, and contribute to our collective growth. Let's dive in together!

entry.title: Re: First steps using the Hana Vector Engine with SAP GEN AI
entry.content:
Thanks for the positive feedback.  I'm pleased you're are giving it a try.

From the errors it looks like in SAP AI CORE (needs to be the extended plan) you may not have configured and deployed the foundation model 'text-embedding-ada-002'  yet.

The configuration should look something like:

Once you've created the config you then need to deploy and check its running:

This may help  models-and-scenarios-in-generative-ai-hub 

 

Alternatively if you don't have the AI CORE Extended plan you can use public API's like those from OpenAI to perform the Embeddings. Check this out: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/embeddings/what-are-embeddings

Good luck with your continued tests.

entry.title: Re: How to log a pdf and csv file in CPI which is incoming
entry.content: Hi Sunil,

entry.title: Re: How to log a pdf and csv file in CPI which is incoming
entry.content: for my case I don't have a zip file. Everyday pdf files are coming and that needs to be logged in CPI in original format

entry.title: /UI2/CL_DATA_ACCESS and JSONPATH
entry.content: The class "/ui2/cl_data_access" can be used to parse the json using jsonpath syntax. But this class is not available in the cloud environment. Are there any substitutes ? ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment ABAP Extensibility

entry.content: Thanks,Antonio for looking into the issue. Here is my submission for Week 3:

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud integration with SAP CPI through an API
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply Carlos, but we are not passing '&' in parameters

Thanks,

Kunal

entry.title: Re: Finding the annotation ID for Standard Fiori App
entry.content: Hi @junwu. I read about and I'm missing connection between BTP and the target system. Fiori apps and extensions are very new to us so I am a bit lost. I want to do two things on a KPI's chart: change the colors of the chart and exclude some data from there. Do I need to create a metdadat extension cds for that? Thanks a mil

entry.title: Build service is not working again
entry.content:
Hi

SAP Build Apps' build service is not reliable. It is not working again.

Have not checked android and iOS, web builds continuously failing..

entry.title: Re: i need to remove duplicates in this query anyone help me??????
entry.content:
By using DISTINCT, there will be only one line per same values of these below 18 columns, i.e. they CANNOT BE duplicate, so please clarify.

 

SELECT DISTINCT 
T2."DocEntry",
T2."DocNum" AS "RR NO",
T2."CardName" AS "Name of the Supplier/Manufacturer",
T3."ItemCode" AS "Itemcode",
T3."Dscription" AS "Item Description",
T4."InvntryUom" AS "UOM",
T15."U_UTL_BTNO" AS "Mfg Batchno",
T15."U_UTL_MFDT",
T15."U_UTL_EXDT",
T15."U_UTL_ANDT",
T15."U_UTL_RTDT",
T15."U_UTL_ARNO", 
T15."U_UTL_APPQ",
T15."U_UTL_REJQ",
T3."PriceBefDi" AS "Rate",
T3."PriceBefDi" * T15."U_UTL_APPQ"-T15."U_UTL_REJQ" AS "Value",
T103."Quantity",

Case when (SELECT sum(a."InQty"-a."OutQty") FROM OINM a WHERE a."DocDate"<[%0] and a."Warehouse" Like '%%APR%%' and a."ItemCode" =T3."ItemCode") >0
then (SELECT sum(a."InQty"-a."OutQty") FROM OINM a WHERE a."DocDate"<[%0] and a."Warehouse" Like '%%APR%%' and a."ItemCode" =T3."ItemCode")-T103."Quantity"
ELSE (SELECT sum(a."InQty"-a."OutQty") FROM OINM a WHERE a."DocDate"<[%0] and a."Warehouse" Like '%%APR%%' and a."ItemCode" =T3."ItemCode")+T15."U_UTL_APPQ"
end as "Balance qty"

entry.title: PRT details not getting copied from master routing.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have set up tools for my DM system and all plugins and features are working fine. I wanted to eliminate the manual addition of PRT details on the routing level in the case of PRT details not being sent by ERP along with the order. I have enabled merge order-specific routing with master routing. In master routing I have the following setup-



Master routing PRT-

Additional routing PRT-

ISSUE: As we can see I have relaxed flow disabled and one each WI and DC attached to this master routing. When an order comes from ERP, these WI and DC get attached to it, but the PRT details are not getting carried over. 

How can I achieve this requirement of carrying over the PRT details to new orders coming from ERP that don't have the PRT? Any recommendations will be very valuable.

Thanks & Regards
Harsh.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Monthly Webinar Update
entry.content:
SAP Integration Suite is an integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) that enables the design, development, execution, governance, curation, analysis, and management of the full lifecycle of integration flows, APIs, and high-volume business events that connect on-premises and cloud-based processes, services, applications, and data across organizations. SAP Integration Suite is available on multiple cloud providers.

In this webcast, we will have two sections:

Product Updates, where we share updates on key capabilities and latest enhancements released for SAP Integration Suite.

OR

#AskAnythingIntegration: Our panel of experts will answer any questions you have on integration.

 

Links:

Link to meeting request

entry.title: Re: What is the significance of creating an implementatio...
entry.content:
Hi @Ramjee_korada, Thank you for your answer. With that, I understand that for a single data model, we create multiple projections with multiple behavior projections where we could have projection specific actions and we can expose those projections to make multiple end applications serving different actions.

This approach would reduce the overhead of creating many actions in a single app and then hiding specific actions by creating variants of the main Fiori app.

Please correct me if I am wrong here. Also, don't we project the actions we create in Behavior Projection? Like "use action setMaterialText"?

entry.title: Re: There is a nice way to clear List of Objects in SAP BUILD APPS (AKA Appgyver)?
entry.content:
If you want it empty, why can't you just set it to empty or [ ] ?

This is what we do in our SAP Build CodeJam, when we want to delete the cart of items (or you can do via formula).

If you want to delete all records from, for example, on-device storage entity, you may need a loop like this.

entry.title: Re: How to unsubscribe other employee from Web Service Me...
entry.content:
1. I tried impersonating into the user's account to unsubscribe the web service message monitoring notifications on the user's behalf but unfortunately, I was getting option to subscribe web service messages instead of unsubscribing.

2. I tried editing the Email ID of the user assuming that if we update invalid Email ID, that user won't get web service message monitoring notifications but didn't worked out.

 

Finally, I have activated the user account temporarily and informed the user to unsubscribe the web service message monitoring notifications and de-activated the user account.

entry.title: Re: Hana\Logs 99%
entry.content:
Hi,

You may try to refer to following note to solve the issue.
2083715 - Analyzing log volume full situations

Best Regards,
Eason Chen

entry.title: Re: How to unsubscribe other employee from Web Service Me...
entry.content: Hi Molly, I tried impersonating into the user's account to unsubscribe the web service message monitoring notifications on the user's behalf but unfortunately, I was getting option to subscribe web service messages instead of unsubscribing.

entry.title: Integration Token BTP
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

We are currently having an issue creating an in Integration Token for SAP SuccesFactors in SAP BTP.
We Have researched the relevant documentation but we cannot find the Integration Tokens panel in BTP and thus create a New Token.

We have ensured that the user has the Sub-account Admin Role assigned.

Any help would be much appreciated.

entry.title: Terminated employees visible in Worker App
entry.content:
Dear Support,

In our system, all terminated employees are visible in the Worker app. I would just like to ask if this is an expected behaviour? Previously, when the Employment-Workforce app was in use terminated employees were not possible to find and now that only Worker app is available it's causing some confusion for key users.

We are using replication of employments data from SuccessFactors. There is no issue with the replication - you can find that in S/4 PERSON_NAME the employee is inactive after the termination date. My only question is if terminated users should be visible in the Worker App.

Thanks

Kind regards

Bartłomiej Burec


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Terminated employees visible in Worker App
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Terminated employees will be visible. Only blocked employees or their blocked assignments won't be visible. During the ILM, the employment is blocked or archived based on ILM policy. Once blocked, it won't be visible. It is the expected behavior.

You may refer the below KBA's for additional informations.

3451645 - Terminated employees visible in Manage Workforce application.

2922814 - How to Delete Employee Data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

2821839 - Employee Is Terminated but Their User Is Still Valid in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

2772518 - Employees Terminated in Employee Central Are not visible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud After Employee Master Data Replication.

Thanks

SAP Support

entry.title: I want to write code that outputs the ip address of the computer in abap, how do I do it?
entry.content:
Dear guys ,

I want to write code that outputs the ip address of the computer in abap, how do I do it?

 

ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: Re: User Exit EXIT_SAPLV60B_008 cloud BAdI replacement
entry.content:
Hi,

We have the same requirement, did you find any replacements for it?

entry.title: Re: Is it correct to delete COGI entries?
entry.content:
For your case, the COGI was generated when do the confirmation, and then the confirmation was canceled.
I think you can delete this COGI item, because the 261 movement will be triggered again when next time do the confirmation, so for this time you can delete it.

entry.title: Even though the program is active and can be run, the system gives an error .
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

All Includes are active. The program is also active.
But when I want to activate the includes one by one, the include becomes active but it also gives the following error?
Why is this happening ? If it gives an error, why does it allow me to activate the include? If it allows me to activate Include, why does it give an error?





Thanks.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 财务-成本会计常见热点问题汇总FAQ
entry.content:
欢迎来到我们的博客！在这篇文章中，我们将SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition上收集到的产品常见问题做汇总并且定期更新这篇文章，以反映SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition上常见问题最新的发展和变化。我们希望通过这样的方式，为您提供一个全面、及时的资源，帮助您更好地了解和利用SAP产品的功能。

本文涉及功能基于SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2402版本，后续版本如果有变化请参考本文最新信息。

1成本会计-本地部署版本OnPremise，ECC上常用功能在Cloud上的应用

1.1内部订单在S/4HANA Cloud上的应用

Q:      客户想使用内部订单对成本、费用进行归集并结算  

A:       在SAP S/4HANA Cloud里内部订单应用程序已被弃用(删除)。 

SAP推荐使用WBS元素代替。工作订单是后勤流程的一部分。 

详细的请见注释2865342 - Internal Orders in SAP S/4HANA on-premise edition

1.2成本差异还原到工单

Q:      客户想把成本差异还原到工单（生产订单、流程订单）  

A:       在SAP S/4HANA Cloud的产品路线图里不支持把成本差异还原到工单,只支持还原到物料。 

请见CIP Production order revaluation at actual prices of activities

1.3批量显示、下载多个物料的实际成本结果

Q:      如题  

A:       截止2208版本，新的应用‘显示实际成本核算结果’，基于33Q 实际成本的计算的结果， 根据成本组件信息来显示料工费等信息。 根据成本组件信息来显示并下载料工费等信息。 可以一次下载多物料的实际价格，标准价格等信息到excel

 

2成本会计-业务操作

2.1批量跑成本估算时，经常发生终止，或者被取消的原因

Q:      如题  

A:       1次超过10000个物料 建议分开几个任务来跑。还有可能是多个用户都在同时跑成本估算导致锁定而取消。

2.2是否能批量显示和导出销售订单里的物料标准成本？

Q:      在“material cost estimates” APP, list of existing material cost estimates中可以查到物料的标准成本，但客户有很多是按单生产的，销售订单会自己跑标准成本，这部分有没有类似APP或者CDS view可以批量看到且导出相关物料的标准成本？  

A:       现在没有CDS view或者APP可以批量查询销售订单的成本估算。 

2.3有没有财务手工报工的app？类似于KB21N？

Q:      如题  

A:       使用overhead_accountant登录使用app Manage Direct Activity Allocation （管理直接活动分配）

2.4冲销统计关键指标出现错误，无法冲销，想要更改为新的统计关键指标值该如何操作？

Q:      如题，常见报错信息BK822  

A:       使用app管理统计关键指标值，类型1的就是这个逻辑，如果重新再建一条相同月份的，会覆盖之前需要修改的数据。 

2.5公司间交易ML实际与标准差异不结转至发出商品中；差异全反应在材料成本差异-其他物料消耗中

Q:      运行完物料分类账之后，差异不会自动在库存商品与主营业务之间分配，全部结转至发出商品科目，每月需手工按数量比例结转，希望自动结转。  

A:       可以参考博客 里关于实际成本-发出商品差异结转部分的方案。

2.6订单结算结果是否可以预先导出检查？

Q:      差异表无法导出，结账前需要对异常做核查，需要在CO88运行后，导出表单。后台运行作业是PDF格式，并且不支持导出   

A:       无功能，无CIP。

2.7在制品计算作业的参数细节

Q:      执行work in process calculation这个作业的时候，参数选择里面有关于选项是否要包含“combined order”的。希望有能多指导说明combined order或者是参数选择的解释说明

A:       combined order是适用于S/4HANA的Mill/DIMP等行业解决方案, 现在Cloud上没有支持这个功能。 而且对于S/4HANA Cloud上的这个job，是基于经典ERP开发的，因此也提供了相关combined order的选项。 所以，默认勾选第一个即可。对客户现有业务没有什么影响。

2.8 生产订单号的生成不规则，调号和回跳频繁，如何解决？

Q:      如题  

A:       可以参照3074286 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Test Data Refresh - Number Range Object Maintenance and Adjustments - Troubleshooting guide 来解决 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3074286

 

2.9为什么实际成本核算运行完毕之后发现有未分配金额？

Q:      如题  

A:       请参见浅谈S4 HANA Cloud 运行APP实际成本核算之后关于未分配金额的解释以及方案处理 (情况1和情况2) 

2.10为什么实际成本核算运行完毕之后发现有未分摊金额？

Q:      如题  

A:       请参见浅谈S/4 HANA Cloud 运行APP实际成本核算之后关于未分摊金额的解释以及方案处理 (情况1和情况2) 

2.11是否可以设定“创建物料成本估算”APP中的默认日期？

Q:      想要修改“创建物料成本估算”APP中的默认日期，双击后台配置中的“日期控制”，提示“没有维护或显示可能”。是否ES系统支持？OP可以的。 希望更改成本核算日期到99991231，而不是每个月的月末。因为当前系统太慢了，并不是所有的物料都需要参与成本估算（因为可能有些料不会发生任何成本价格上的变化）。  

A:       日期控制不能修改或添加，可以使用SAP预配置的PC01

2.12如何对生产订单打上删除标志？

Q:      由于没有打上删除标志的生产订单在完成结算并关闭之后还是会在下一次的运行差异计算中被筛选到，从而影响执行效率，如何解决这个问题？ 

A:       Run Variance Calculation - By Period (KKS5),差异计算会根据订单主数据进行选取，打上删除标记的订单不会进行差异计算，而不是根据Teco状态来选取订单。 

From <https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/393686> 

 细节清单"差异计算中的标识，出于性能原因，SAP 建议您不要在集中处理中设置“详细清单”标识。 

 From <https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/393686> 

官方建议给打上删除标记，并且如果未在集中运行中选中“详细清单”复选框，则可以大大提高性能. 

目前APP：“批量处理生产订单”可以批量打上REL, TECO, Closed等，无法打上删除标识. 

对于删除标识：客户可以使用API: API Reference | Production Order (Version 2) | SAP API Business Hub 批量处理生产订单。 

另外考虑测试并整体切换启用到基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)，替代现有的期末结算 - 工厂 (‏BEI‏) 

通过执行每个业务事件（例如生产活动确认、组件消耗，包括反冲等）将间接费用成本、在制品、差异过账到财务报表，不需要月末结账的步骤。从而解决期末结算-工厂中的app性能问题。  

也可以参考博文: https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1570986 

 

2.13一个物料有多个生产版本，如何处理以及选择的逻辑？

Q:      在实际业务中，经常会有一个物料存在多个物料清单，多个工艺路线，导致会有多个生产版本，想了解下在物料成本估算时系统是如何选择生产版本的？以及如何管理生产版本，比如只想试用最新的生产版本，如何操作？ 

A:       参考注释2973670来理解背后的逻辑。 

使用app 处理生产版本 锁定或者删除不需要的生产版本 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6400')/S29 

3成本会计-报表

3.1想了解成本还原报表如何实现？

Q:      客户属于离散型制造业，准备IPO，层级结构达到1000层，手工出报表不切实际。了解成本还原报表如何实现。   

A:       1. 根据和其他客户的联合创新，使用iRPA(智能机器人流程自动化)技术来实现当前复杂而且紧迫的成本还原报表的可行性较大。如果需要，可以帮助联系产品经理进行进一步的沟通； 

  1. 对于管理会计对生产流程中差异监控的痛点，推荐使用3F0（基于事件的生产成本过账），可以简化月结流程中对于间接费用计算、在制品计算和基于事件的差异计算等。如果需要，可以帮助联系产品经理进行进一步的沟通。 

SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud‎链接 如下，搜索关键字3F0 

https://rapid.sap.com/bp/#/browse/packageversions/BP_CLD_ENTPR 

实际成本相关的CDS View已经在路线图上，正在开发中。

3.2成本还原业务逻辑？

Q:      如题   

A:       请仔细阅读如下链接文档，尤其是成本汇总和差异部分，理解成本还原的逻辑，并且在Q系统测试并验证。 

https://help.sap.com/viewer/7f47a6d9441c46ac86c96fd27f6015f0/LATEST/zh-CN/4cc57871cfca4755a96d3929f16d9e38.html 

3.3如何在app成本中心 – 实际里增加标准字段？

Q:      APP: 成本中心(实际)，报表过滤器中没有客户、供应商、资产等信息维度，是否有其他办法可以添加增加客户、供应商及资产维度？   

A:       通过自定义字段添加

4成本会计-预算

4.1 S/4HANA Cloud提供的部分预算可用性控制功能

Q:      如题   

A:       提供基于项目/成本中心的预算可用性控制。请按需使用https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/30cb8deab95e4d8c9420aeabb2ae496f.html?locale=zh-CN 这里的预算功能只能按照年度和总量来进行管控，可以配置超出金额是否自动发出错误或者警告信息；按照上传模板，可以做到按月上传预算金额，但是无法按照月度，季度来进行管控。 如果有新的需求，可以到https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/1169提交新的需求。关于预算在Cloud上的路线图，可以查阅https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67837800100800007389&range=CURRENT-LAST&q=BUDGET#Q1%202023 

4.2 SAC提供的全面预算功能

Q:      如题   

A:       SAC提供的全面预算功能； 

SAC预算介绍： 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/63a578e27ffd47ceb2f9cd2319a0ee3e.html?locale=zh-CN 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/1fb1f4ce92f44fc983debc25ac1f2cc9.html?locale=zh-CN 

示例场景： 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f912449e2b04426a8ebe37383f484f3a.html?locale=zh-CN 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/6ce52bc4ef0640a491ed3c45b5152435.html?locale=zh-CN 

申请30天试用SAC： 

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/cloud-analytics.html 

5成本会计-基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)

5.1 基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)的优势简要介绍

Q:      如题   

A:       如果激活 3F0，BEI 月结步骤可以不执行。可以有效解决期末大量生产订单需要进行计算，结算等性能问题的情况。 

  • 可以跳过制造订单类型 YBM1、YBM2、YBM3、YBM4、YBM5、YBM9、YBW1、YPK1、YQ01、YQ02、YQ10 的月结操作。 
  • 3F0 对按库存生产和按订单生产的生产订单有效。 

5.2 基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)的一些重要资源

Q:      如题   

A:       如果激活 3F0，BEI 月结步骤可以不执行。可以有效解决期末大量生产订单需要进行计算，结算等性能问题的情况。 

  • 可以跳过制造订单类型 YBM1、YBM2、YBM3、YBM4、YBM5、YBM9、YBW1、YPK1、YQ01、YQ02、YQ10 的月结操作。 
  • 3F0 对按库存生产和按订单生产的生产订单有效。 

生产会计帮助 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4032610758dc437089f0c28320eec93f/d1c7eaa7c7824c6293d13ef783fb43ce.html?locale=zh-CN 

基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏) – 最佳业务实践 

 
https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolP/3F0 

 

有关如何从基于期间的生产成本过账(BEI)切换到基于事件的生产成本过账 (3F0) 的说明，请参阅注释 3042687 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Transition from BEI (Period-End Closing) to 3F0 (Event-Based Production Accounting) in S/4 HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042687 

 

有关通过产品成本收集器维护分类账特定物料价格的结果，请参阅注释 3042679 - - FAQ_Production Accounting: Restrictions for Product Cost Collectors with Parallel Accounting in S/4 HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042679 

 

有关通过生产订单/流程订单结算到非物料接收方的分类账特定物料价格维护的结果，请参阅注释 3042696 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Cost Distribution to non-MAT Receivers。 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042696 

 

有关使用“运行实际结算”进行分类账特定生产成本结算的结果，请参阅注释 3203113- FAQ_Production Accounting: Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 。 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3203113 

 

有关基于期间的生产成本解决方案的限制，请参阅注释3049064 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Restrictions for BEI (Period-End Closing) with Parallel Accounting in S/4HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3049064 

 

有关基于事件的生产成本过账(3F0)的功能介绍，请参阅注释3042082 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Parallel Accounting with Event-Based Production Accounting (3F0) in S/4 HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042082 

 

有关基于事件的在制品过账的功能介绍，请查阅注释2737228 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Work in Process Posting for Product Cost by Order 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2737228 

 

有关基于事件的差异过账的功能介绍，请查阅注释2910083 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Variance Posting for Product Cost by Order 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2910083 

 

有关实时目标成本计算的功能介绍，请参阅注释2618359 - FAQ_Production Accounting: On-the-Fly Target Cost Calculation for Product Cost by Order 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2618359 

 

有关基于事件的联副产品成本分配，请参阅注释3042673 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Cost Distribution for Co- and By- Products 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042673 

 

5.3 基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)的日常处理要点 

Q:      S/4HANA Cloud在2105版本的重大升级是平行会计，基于这一特性的基于事件的生产成本过账(3F0)也从这一版本开始对于新实施的客户作为默认激活的范围项目，同时取代了范围项目BEI（默认不激活）。老客户就存在使用BEI，同时可能主动、被动操作会使用3F0的情况。    

A:       1. 如果激活了范围项目33Q 实际成本,  须要 运行APP F3683计划产品成本核算作业 中的任务模板基于事件的过账 - 实际成本核算重估的在制品数量过账（Event-Based Posting – WIP Quantity Posting for Actual Costing Revaluation ）； 

  1. 平时和月底运行 APP F5133 基于事件的解决方案监控器（Event-Based Solution Monitor - Product Costing）， 查看日常业务 有无问题，如果有问题，要按照如下步骤进行修正； 

如果有未过账或者过账异常的间接费用，月底须要运行APP F3683计划产品成本核算作业 中的任务模板后处理基于事件的过账 - 间接费用过账(Postprocess Event-Based Postings – Overhead Posting); 

如果有未过账或者过账异常的订单，月底须要运行 APP F3683计划产品成本核算作业 中的任务模板后处理基于事件的过账 - 产品成本核算（Postprocess Event-Based Postings – Product Costing）; 

更多链接

后勤FAQ
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edit...

销售FAQ

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-erp-%E4%BA%91%E9%94%80%E5...

集成与扩展FAQ

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edit...

分析FAQ

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud%E5%B5%8C%E5...

财务总账FAQ

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-%E8%B4%A2%E5%8A%A1-%E6%80%BB%E8%B4%A6%E4%BC%9A%E8%AE%A1%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E7%83%AD%E7%82%B9%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%B1%87%E6%80%BBfaq/ba-p/13627607

应收应付FAQ

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-%E8%B4%A2%E5%8A%A1-%E5%BA%94%E6%94%B6%E5%BA%94%E4%BB%98%E4%BC%9A%E8%AE%A1%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E7%83%AD%E7%82%B9%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%B1%87%E6%80%BBfaq/ba-p/13649140

entry.title: E:SOCM_ACTION_LOG:132, while trying to craete new CD
Migration of SAP Hana On-Premise Database to SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
SAP provides a tool called Self-Service Migration to assist migration to SAP HANA Cloud.

This tool checks the compatibility of your SAP HANA database with SAP HANA Cloud and identifies which features, database objects, and SQL statements can be migrated seamlessly, and which need to be adapted before use.

Self-Service Migration tool also includes information about the features that cannot be automatically migrated and offers suggestions about how to adapt your current implementation to work in SAP HANA Cloud where possible.

Pre-requisites

  • Supported for SAP HANA Database Revision 53 or greater.
  • Connectivity Service Entitlement with the service plan “connectivity_proxy” must be enabled for your subaccount using the SAP BTP cockpit.
  • Create the migration user in the source HANA database and assign necessary privileges.
  • Establish a connection to the source database using Cloud Connector.

Procedure

1. Open SAP HANA Cloud Central, navigate to “Migrations”.

2. Choose “Create Migration”, specify the migration information, and then “Create”.

3. In the PLAN phase,

a. Select the source database system that you want to migrate.

Enter the virtual host and port that you specified in the cloud connector configuration.

b. Specify the cloud connector details.

Enable Cloud Connector and specify the Cloud Connector Location ID.

c. Enter the credentials of the migration user that was created in the tenant database of the source system.

d. Check Compatibility with SAP HANA Cloud.

e. Once the Self-Service Migration tool finishes checking your database, it lists any incompatibilities found. The list is grouped by Database Objects and SQL Statements.

f. It provides information on the compatibility of the database objects and executed statements with SAP HANA Cloud.

g. Only checks with the severity 'CRITICAL' and 'UNKNOWN' will forbid the migration. Checks with the severity 'ERROR' or below will allow the migration; however, it is possible that some functionality may not work as expected in the target database.

h. Review and resolve the incompatibilities where possible. Choose Proceed to Preparation Phase.

4. In the PREPARATION phase, you specify what to migrate, where to migrate it to, and which user credentials are required to perform the migration. (XS advanced service instances is not included in this migration)

a. Specify the credentials of the migration user and choose “Save and Proceed to Select Target”.

b. Choose the target database for the migration. Enter the credentials of the DBADMIN user on the target database and “Proceed to Execution Phase”.

5. In the EXECUTION phase, choose “Start Migration” to trigger the migration process and monitor progress in the status bars.

After the migration, a summary is displayed, and you can proceed to the VALIDATION phase.

6. In the VALIDATION phase, the metadata and data of the migrated content are checked for consistency, also the record count of the tables to be migrated can be checked.

Choose “Proceed to Finalization Phase”.

7. In the FINALIZATION phase, the finalization process removes all artifacts that were temporarily stored by the migration service.

a. Choose “Deactivate migration user” to disable the DMUSER after the migration in the target SAP HANA database and “Finalize Migration” to complete the migration and start the post-migration clean-up.

b. The SAP HANA database is migrated to SAP HANA Cloud. A summary screen is displayed, containing information about the completed migration, including statistics about the migrated database, migration step durations, and validation statuses.

c. “Clean Up Process” will archive the completed migration. Once the migration is archived, it serves as a reference and cannot be altered. Up to 20 migrations can be archived.

Conclusion

In this blog, we have learnt on how to migration SAP Hana On-Premise to SAP HANA Cloud using Self Service Tool.

entry.title: Re: Connection to HRTT may be lost
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: About the help portal variance of Extension Ledger, S/4HANA Private cloud vs Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

There are differences in the description of help portal about the Restrictions of Extension Ledger between S/4HANA Private cloud and Public cloud.

In the help portal of  Private and ON-PREMISE, there is no Restrictions on the page.
(The corresponding page is the following URL.)
Extension Ledger | SAP Help Portal

But in the Public help portal , some Restrictions are noted, such as "Extension ledgers are not integrated with Asset Accounting."
Extension Ledger | SAP Help Portal

Is this difference a simple omission?
Or are there no Restrictions of the Extension Ledger in the Public cloud and ON-PREMISE?

Thank you in advance for your reply.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance FIN General Ledger SAP S/4HANA

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: material master data field "mat.grouping"
entry.content:
This field is used while creating a new material, and it is a way of grouping together several materials or services with the same attributes for more straightforward reporting, consolidation and analysis.

The "Material Grouping" field provides flexibility on how you categorize and manage groups of your materials, but it isn't mandatory, and there isn't check take place for this field.

entry.title: Re: Result recording is not updating/Overwriting the batc...
entry.content:
Hi Arjuna,

First of all thanks a lot for your continuous support and involvement in this.

The resolution, explained in the note 2627115, was already maintained for the characteristics - i.e., additional values check box ticked. 

Also, business tried to change the value via MSC2N, and it was allowing to change the same. Only issue is , it's not getting updated via Inspection Lot RR.

entry.title: Missing handling unit (but the HU number shows up in the document flow)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I'm having this strange situation where I cannot access HU information from either the delivery document or via HU03.

 

When I try to access via "Display document" button in the document flow, I get no response.

When I try to access the HU information via HU03, I get "Handling units could not be found. Check for typing errors " message.

 

The HU number does show up in the document flow of this delivery document and since we have a change history which suggests that we have once packed items in this delivery document, the HU did exist in the past.

I'd appreciate it if you could tell me why this is occurring?

I'd also appreciate it if you could tell me if it's possible to access deleted handling units via some tables/transaction codes. I could not find this handling units in VEKP/VEPO tables. So I'm assuming that the information was deleted from those tables.

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content: Thanks ! @sveabecker. I did it long back and finger crossed to be a part of this year too.

entry.title: Re: Implement consumption specific behavior in ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Great post. Thank you for sharing!
Another syntax to directly modify using EML which I tried and worked is - 

MODIFY AUGMENTING ENTITY ZI_SuperSessionChoice
              CREATE FIELDS ( SupersessionType channel validfrom )
              WITH VALUE #( FOR ls_entity IN entities  (
                                 %cid       = ls_entity-%cid
                                 %key       = ls_entity-%key
                                 %is_draft  = ls_entity-%is_draft
                                 SupersessionType = zcl_supersession_helper=>gc_ss_type-choice
                                 channel = zcl_supersession_helper=>gc_channel-both
                                 validfrom = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( )
                                 %control-SupersessionType = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                 %control-channel = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                 %control-ValidFrom = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ) ).

entry.title: Re: Even though the program is active and can be run, the system gives an error .
entry.content: Please indicate the message as text for better indexing of your question: "Internal error occurred during runtime generation of Program ... (Dump ID: GEN_INCLUDE_NOT_EXEC)"

entry.title: Re: Even though the program is active and can be run, the system gives an error .
entry.content: Don't forget to search the forum and SAP notes, I can find answers at both places.

entry.title: The Future Does Not Fit in the Containers of the Past
entry.content:
Explore the transformative impact of technology in our global society with Rishad Tobaccowala's compelling keynote at the SAP Enterprise Architects 2024 Forum. Delve into the critical shifts in demographics, power, and mindsets that shape our future. Tobaccowala challenges us to rethink leadership and innovation strategies to thrive in an ever-changing technological landscape.

Main Recommendations from AI

These recommendations aim to guide individuals and organizations in navigating the complexities of a shifting global landscape.

 

  • Embrace Change: Encourage continuous learning and adaptation to stay relevant in a rapidly changing world.

 

  • Develop a Growth Mindset: Cultivate flexibility, resilience, and openness to new ideas.

 

  • Leverage Technology Wisely: Utilize technology, especially AI, to enhance human capabilities rather than replace them.

 

  • Prioritize Human Connection: Despite technological advances, maintain focus on human-centric values and relationships.

 

  • Lead with Vision and Empathy: Leadership should combine forward-thinking with empathy and effective communication to navigate through change.

 

On Upgrading Our Mental Operating Systems:

 

  • Spend an hour every day learning: Emphasizes the importance of dedicating time to learning every day to stay ahead of changes and not fall behind.

 

  • Once in a while, build a case for the exact opposite of what you think is true: This encourages critical thinking and the ability to understand different perspectives. If you cannot argue for the opposite of your beliefs, it's challenging to be certain of their validity. This practice also helps in anticipating competitors' moves.

 

  • Recognize we have become an age of makers and builders and creators, and try to make, build, create something that's really important: Highlights the shift towards a more creative and constructive economy and the importance of contributing through creation.

 

Remember:

“To thrive in an AI age we will have to upgrade our HI ( Human  Inspiration) to complement and enhance our impact. The future is AI + HI” -  Rishad Tobaccowala

 

Watch Rishad’s Keynote Talk

Nugget of Next: 

Subscribe to Rishad’s regular Sunday Post, I enjoy reading them every Sunday. 

Read and subscribe to Rishad’s Posts

CTA:
For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and Follow Paul Kurchina - https://www.linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina/ 

 

Flag Photo:

* This was our first Flag Photo with the group, we had a minor adjustment to make for future photos

entry.title: Re: CVI Conversion - Precheck master data errors
entry.content:
When encountering number range overlapping errors during a brownfield conversion from ECC to S/4 HANA, it's essential to address them promptly to ensure a smooth transition. Here's a step-by-step guide on how to resolve such errors:

1. Identify Overlapping Number Ranges:

  • Review the precheck master data error report to identify the specific number range objects and intervals that are overlapping.

2. Analyze the Cause:

  • Investigate why the number ranges are overlapping. Common reasons include:
    • Incorrect configuration of number range intervals.
    • Changes in business processes leading to overlapping ranges.
    • Manual adjustments made without updating number range settings.

3. Assess Impact:

  • Evaluate the impact of overlapping ranges on existing and future transactions, data integrity, reporting, and compliance.

4. Determine Solutions:

  • Depending on the cause, decide on appropriate solutions:
    • Adjust Number Range Intervals: Modify the intervals of overlapping number ranges to ensure uniqueness.
    • Realign Business Processes: Align business processes to prevent overlapping ranges in the future.
    • Data Cleanup: Review and rectify any inconsistencies caused by overlapping ranges in existing data.

5. Engage Stakeholders:

  • Collaborate with relevant stakeholders, including business process owners and IT teams, to validate proposed solutions and ensure they meet business requirements.

6. Test Solutions:

  • Before implementing changes in the production environment, conduct thorough testing in a sandbox or development environment.
  • Verify that the proposed solutions effectively resolve the overlapping range errors without introducing new issues.

7. Implement Changes:

  • Once testing is successful and stakeholders approve the solutions, implement them in the production system.
  • Follow established change management procedures and document the changes made.

8. Monitor Post-Conversion:

  • After the conversion to S/4 HANA, monitor the system closely to ensure that the overlapping range issues have been resolved and that no new issues arise.
  • Address any unforeseen issues promptly to maintain system stability.

9. Document and Train:

  • Document the resolution process, including the steps taken and lessons learned, for future reference.
  • Provide training or knowledge transfer sessions to relevant personnel to ensure they understand how to manage number ranges effectively in the S/4 HANA environment.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition with BTP?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

yes that is the whole purpose behind BTP. It's meant to be an extension platform for SAP S/4HANA.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: I am more interested in master data management or material management

entry.title: Re: HANA Hardware checks for Vmware
entry.content:
Unveil the prowess of SAP HANA by downloading and configuring its hardware and cloud measurement tool. This intricate process enables meticulous assessment, ensuring that the envisioned infrastructure aligns seamlessly with the rigorous system and performance standards imperative for certification.

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_HW_CLOUD_TOOLS/02bb1e64c2ae4de7a11369f4e70a6394/8ce95324d9624405a996b28cb62ae036.html

entry.title: ABAP code of Advanced Return Management
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm testing ARM process and have a question about posting change.


Here is a test return delivery, as you can see, two outbound deliveries (posting change in warehouse) will be generated.
If I understand correctly, the first outbound delivery generates a posting change document in warehouse and then triggers goods movment.
Afterwards, the second outbound delivery is created, my question is how it is created? Maybe someone could show the ABAP code here.

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Question about routing scheduling (converting to days)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question about routing scheduling.

(CA03 --> Extras --> Scheduling --> Schedule --> Results)

 

Would you tell me how the system converts queue time in hours to the amount in days in routing scheduling?

 

For instance we have 6 hour queue time for the first operation in a routing and 0 hours for everything else.

The waiting time and move time are all set to 0 hours for all of those operations.

(1 hour break is assigned for those work centers. Operating time is set to 6.75 hours for all of the work centers in the routing.)

 

When we have 6 hour queue time only for the first operation, the interoperation time is calculated as 0.31 days.

But we have 6 hour queue time only for the last operation, the interoperation time becomes 0.96 days instead.

In both of those cases, the total queue time is the same amount of time (in hours), but they get different amount when they are converted to days.

I don't know where/how we get those differences and how the interoperation time is converted to days.

I'd really appreciate it if you could tell me about it.

 

Best Regards

 

 

 

When we schedule operations in routing via extras --> scheduling --> schedule, we get the amount of time for inte

entry.title: The system cannot find the file specified - BP
entry.content:
The system message pops out every time the user tries to find a BP. The find function is working, but the system message is interrupting their work. It is only happening to 1 user.

Can you please advise? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - PostgreSQL SSH Tunnel and SSH Tunneling Explained
entry.content:
HI Yogananda ,

Thanks for the detailed blog on the PostgreSQL SSL tunnel.

Our requirement is we are developing Springboot Java application through SAP BAS by enabling PostgreSQL instance as hyperscaller option

 

Some how we are unable to connect to our PostgreSQL instance through our Java App

We are unable to connect to our PostgreSQL Server instance through PgAdmin 4.

We are encountering connection timeout errors.

Can you help me whith any documentation on how to connect to PostgreSQL through Java in BAS.

Also let me know, does the ports disable causing issue, if so how do we enable it.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Mallesh

mpyreddy@gemini-us.com

+917989981075

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new pipeline concept in Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

Nice blog, the concept is really interesting for SAP PO migrations and responsible use of JMS queues. We have also used similar patterns for SAP PO migrations, but using a DataStore, not JMS.

Is there any reason to use JMS over the DS, for these Async Patterns, other than performance and being able to do the manual retry from the queue?

It would be really interesting to elaborate a bit on that.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: "Text Through Text Associations" in RAP triggers exception
entry.content: Hi Marian. Have you found the explanation for such the behavior? I also was going to avoid explicit text field projection, but rather using text association. Thank you.

entry.title: Integrate Solman and ServiceNow using SAP CPI or PO as middleware.
entry.content:
There is a requirement to Integrate Solman with ServiceNow using a middleware. SNMP Trap is being used at the Solman side. Is it possible to use SAP CPI or PO in this scenario as middleware?
And if SNMP Trap is avoided, is there any different way to send data to middleware?

Any information will be much appreciated.
Thank You.

entry.title: Sales Contracts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_order quantity restriction compared to contract quantity
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

There is a requirement to restrict sales order quantity referenced from sales contracts should not be more than sales contract quantity in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

In S/4HANA On-premise & ECC version , the below mentioned option (completion rule) is available to enable restriction at item category level.

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is there an option like the above to set order item is completed after full quantity has been referenced. 

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Universal ID created but old content is lost for P User
entry.content: I am also facing the same issue :-(, sent mail to SAP for support as well

entry.title: automatic calculation of plan activity rates
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

Hope you are doing well,

Kindly we are facing an issue on the public cloud in the Financials-->Management accounting module-->Overhead accounting-->planning.

Where maintaining the activity quantity (Fiori app: manage cost rate-plan) doesn't exist, also the functionality of automatic calculation of plan activity rate doesn't exist.

The above requirements can be done smoothly on SAP private cloud or SAP ECC as below:

1-Enter activity output quantity (Fiori app: Edit prices for activity types-cost center) or (Tcode: KP26)

2-Perform automatic calculation of plan rates for activity types (Tcode: KSS4, Tcode: KSPI)

Kindly advise what are the alternative procedures to be followed on SAP public cloud to meet the above requirements ?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: automatic calculation of plan activity rates
entry.content:
We request you to refer the below links for more details regarding your requirement.

Help Portal Links:

Manage Cost Rates - Plan

Actual Costing

Actual Costing: FAQ

Fiori Apps:

Manage Cost Rate Plan

Community Links:

Cost Center Activity Planning in Public Cloud

Issue with Activity Quantity planning in S4 HANA cloud

Split Costs - Cost Centers - Actual/Plan Fiori apps in S/4 Hana public Cloud

Regards,
Ankit K

entry.title: Re: DUMMY_NO_REQ_CREATED error in DTP run in Process chain
entry.content:
There might be a lock because of which you are facing this failure.

Check in SM12 and delete the lock.

 

Kind Regards,

V

entry.title: Re: How can I create a column with "Direct Links" to clas...
entry.content:
Hi,

I tested more:

This is my actual sql:

Select

'https://performancemanager5.successfactors.eu/sf/learning?destUrl=https%3a%2f%2fdeutschel%2eplateau%2ecom%2flearning%2fuser%2fdeeplink%5fredirect%2ejsp%3flinkId%3dSCHEDULED%5fOFFERING%5fDETAILS%26scheduleID%3d' || a.schd_id || '%26fromSF%3dY&company=Lufthansa' as direct_link,

This select works perfectly fine in PRD, but after importing to SF, the report fails.

So I played around

Select

'Tom' || a.schd_id || 'Bill' does not fail in SF LNR

'Tom?' || a.schd_id || 'Bill' does fail in SF LNR

So I assume it is the question mark that causes the failure.

Any idea how to work around this?

Brgds., Uwe

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager 2310 - Notification create screen is blank for IOS Devices.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are facing issue on IOS devices that when we are clicking on create notification.

Action is not getting triggered and Add notification screen fails to load . On Android device its working fine.
Could you please help us here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Service Management
entry.content:
Hello @pvsbprasad ,

Great Blog. It is really help.

What I understand from this Blog is that an Employee can create cases for himself within a company using SAP Service cloud V2. 

In Service Cloud V1, there as an integration between Ask HR in BTP with SAP C4C v1 to create/view Ticket directly in AskHR and it can be accessed in C4C. Do we have any such integration with AskHR with SAP Service Cloud V2 in the same manner for the Case creation and Display? Please help me with related blog.

 

Regards,

Pranoy Kumar

entry.title: Auto Deleted Line Items of PR
entry.content:
Hello.

I have 3 PRs that has been marked for deletion. Also, the deletion of line item in PR was not reflected in Item Changes, the only change that was reflected is that when I undeleted the PR.

May I know how to resolve this issue? or what is the cause of this issue?

Thank you so much.

~B

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: e6ac8d77aedde4e1cec14869d6057d3a33d5e9775513167946bcc0fda76177d3

entry.title: Re: RAP: Creating a child entity with 'create by associat...
entry.content:
If you define a static factory action for the child entity, you do not get the parent keys.
When you define a factory action for the child entity, you must select an existing entity as a reference.

When you define a factory action for the parent entity, you have the parent keys, but in a standard Fiori elements app, the action button is in the header area instead of next to the child table. If the table is not refreshed after executing the action try defining a side effect in the behavior definition.

Another approach could be to enable inline creation mode for the child table. The user can quickly create new entries where the parent keys are prefilled. It's faster than clicking on an action button.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0

I will poke around with the app and try to learn some more.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Can you make sure that the SAP Build Apps Preview App has permission to use the camera?

entry.title: Don’t Get Fooled Into Climate Change Complacency
entry.content:
A cold snap in the Ticino, on the border of Switzerland and Italy, on the slopes overlooking Lake Lugarno, resulted in a specifically poor spaghetti crop. The last few weeks of March have been a worrying time for the spaghetti farmers. There is always a chance of late frost which, while not entirely ruining the crop, does have an impact on the flavor which makes it difficult to obtain top prices on the world markets.

Another reason for the failed crop lies in the increase of the Spaghetti weevil, a tiny creature that has decimated crops in the past. Of course, spaghetti cultivation in Switzerland is nowhere near the size of the Italian industry and the vast spaghetti plantations in the Po Valley, but a bumper or failed crop can still significantly impact the prices paid on the global market based on supply and demand.

Yes, it’s April 1st and this story is based on another story first shown on April Fool’s Day in 1957 on the BBC current affairs program Panorama (check it out here, it is well worth a watch).

 

It’s a stark reminder that if we ignore climate change, it will make a fool of us all. 

Here are a few alarming climate change examples from 2023 that are no joke:

  • When a Bomb cyclone hit California in early 2023, excessive flooding (after years of drought) affected imports, exports, transportation and damaged crops all over the state.
  • In July, India announced an exportation ban on non-basmati white rice due to rising prices and fear of shortages due to El Nino disruptions.
  • The Sriracha hot source shortage was “hot” on social media. This was due to poor jalapeno crops in Mexico, which relies on water from the Colorado river which was depleted.
  • Panama Canal water levels were also very low which is putting at risk the estimated 40% of consumer goods transported between Northers Asia and the east coast of the USA.
  • In October you could read about a sugar shortage due to droughts in India, and floods in Brazil! This was compounded by a poor sugar beet harvest in Europe.

 

Be part of the solution not the problem

It’s imperative that companies make sustainability central to their overall business strategy. To begin the process, business leaders must examine all functions of their network and identify sustainability weaknesses within and outside of their organization.

For example, supply chains are a major contributor to waste and carbon emissions and are therefore a major area of opportunity for improvements. Creating measurable goals to improve a company’s supply chain (e.g., eliminating single-use plastics within the next 18 months, or becoming carbon neutral by 2030,) can restore the confidence of customers, investors, employees and other stakeholders that the organization is making active strides to become more sustainable.

But setting goals is one thing and meeting them is another. Supply chain leaders must make sure they are accounting for and managing climate-related emissions across all parts of their supply chain (Scope 1,2 and 3), which includes suppliers, contract manufacturers, logistics service providers and other trading partners.

This is no small feat – a lack of visibility across a company’s supply chain is typically the reason why business leaders struggle to manage the total carbon footprint of products. By employing technology to provide the visibility they need to see across their supply chain, business leaders can then take actions to reduce their company’s end-to-end carbon footprint.

To learn more about how to get your business ready to enable a risk-resilient and sustainable supply chain, download the recent Oxford Economics Research.

Follow me on Twitter.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @Nitesh1 it is great to meet you. I am based in the US outside of Philadelphia. I am curious if you have experience and / or looking to get expertise in S/4HANA Cloud? Best of luck!

entry.title: Facing issue in SAC custom widget for "onFileUpload" function
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am facing an issue in the latest version of the custom widget. The old version consists of a function called "onFileUpload" on which we could write our own code as per the requirement, but the latest version consists of 3 functions "onSuccess", "onPartialFailure", "onFailure" where we cannot write our own code.
The code I have written in the old version, as per the story requirement. For ex: When the flat file is loaded, I have written a code to check whether the loaded data is correct or not. If the data is incorrect, it will give me the pop up along with the error details and also it will display at how many lines error exists.
I want this feature to be added in the latest version of the custom widget. I have also shared the link of both the versions.
Old version: https://sap-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/p/sean_johnson/EnzjVyzswQdBoMp8QEcXIIABAG7FZuLrrRoktFfRCbUdtg?e=eU6XQy
New version: https://github.com/SAP-samples/analytics-cloud-custom-widget/tree/main/Custom-Widget-Samples/file-upload-widget#readme

Does anyone have any idea how to solve this issue?

Thanks

Arup

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@TusharTrivedi it is great to meet you. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. My background is with analytics and SAP BW, as well as many SAP solutions as an end-user. May I ask your specific areas of interest to engage in the community? Please meet SAP mentor (or you may know Krishna who was also at TechEd!) Krishna Kishor Kammaje - SAP Community.

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Intelligence Python Operators and Cloud Connector – TCP

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@HarshilShahand @Manny-D it is great to meet you. May I ask your product areas of interest in the community? Also, please read the influencer blogs at the Influencer Site SAP Influencers Directory | SAP Community

It is great to see everyone engaged on products and topics of interest plus local meetups are fun too! Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Get Certified: C_HANATEC_17
entry.content:
Hello @HayBouten ,

The Certification C_HCADM_05 : Provision and administer databases in SAP HANA Cloud expired on 28th March 2024.


I didn't see any new version of the certificate in list of new certificates : https://training.sap.com/certification/validity

What is the new version of this certification? 

I see the learning journey of this still exists : Provision and Administer Databases in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning

and this learning journey say leads to certification.

<![if !vml]>

 

<![endif]><![if !vml]>

 

<![endif]>

 So which certification does this leads to? because I don't want to spend hours of learning time which leads to nothing.
So, please let me know  which certification to choose after learning  Provision and Administer Databases in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning

Thanks and Regards,
Revanth Kanteerava

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
@alucian welcome, it is great to meet you in the community? May I ask your areas of interest and product areas (where you want to learn more and help others too!)

You can find great people to engage with in the Groups!
